ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robotic_arms" (
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robotic arm */,
  "arm_name" TEXT /* Name of the robotic arm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the robotic arm */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the robotic arm */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the robotic arm */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the robotic arm was manufactured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the robotic arm (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the robotic arm that collected the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., training, testing) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorization and search */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_arm_id FOREIGN KEY ("arm_id") REFERENCES robotic_arms ("arm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset that the data point belongs to */,
  "frame" INTEGER /* Frame number of the data point */,
  "t1" REAL /* Value of t1 for the data point */,
  "theta1" REAL /* Value of theta1 for the data point */,
  "t2" REAL /* Value of t2 for the data point */,
  "theta2" REAL /* Value of theta2 for the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the data point was collected */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics or sensor data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the dataset was accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that the source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was created */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., internal, external, partner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
